item.title: 天然气短缺与酷暑天气吸引投资者涌向印度电力公司
item.description: 印度煤炭公司股价连续第三日上涨，收盘价创下逾16个月新高。【原文：Coal India shares rose for the third successive day to end at their highest level in over 16 months.】

item.title: 菲律宾失业率激增后，为应对伊朗战争冲击劳动力市场做准备
item.description: 由于中东冲突的影响，菲律宾失业率已飙升至近四年最高水平，该国劳动力市场正为即将到来的更多困境做准备。【原文：The Philippines is bracing for more pain ahead in its labor market due to the Middle East conflict, after joblessness surged to the highest in nearly four years.】

item.title: 铝价逼近四年高位，因战争风险恐致冶炼厂停产
item.description: 铝价逼近四年高位，因中东战争迟迟未见平息迹象，引发冶炼厂停产风险。【原文：Aluminum traded near the highest level in four years on the risk of smelter closures as the Middle East war showed little sign of ending soon.】

item.title: 铁矿石受CMRG限购令推动，创一年来最大单周涨幅
item.description: 铁矿石价格正朝着逾一年来最大单周涨幅迈进，此前中国国有买家扩大了对必和必拓集团产品的限制措施。【原文：Iron ore headed for its biggest weekly gain in over a year, after China’s state-backed buyer moved to expand restrictions on BHP Group products.】

item.title: 丰田等巨额交易推动日本并购活动创纪录
item.description: 去年并购交易的繁荣使日本成为银行家和投资者的优先选择，而第一季度末的势头表明，即便中东局势动荡，2026年仍有望更上一层楼。【原文：Last year’s deals boom put Japan on the priority list for bankers and investors, and momentum toward the end of the first quarter suggests 2026 could go a step better, even with the crisis in the Middle East.】

item.title: 腾讯、阿里巴巴蓄势待发，OpenClaw人工智能热潮席卷中国
item.description: 围绕人工智能软件OpenClaw的热议，进一步提升了市场对腾讯控股有限公司和阿里巴巴集团控股有限公司财报的关注度，以及该智能体如何推动多个科技行业领域的增长与创新。【原文：The hype around artificial intelligence software OpenClaw has heightened the interest in Tencent Holdings Ltd. and Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. earnings and how the agent might drive growth and innovation across multiple technology industry sectors.】

item.title: 中国开往朝鲜的列车首航乘客寥寥
item.description: 周四北京站的早高峰格外喧闹，乘客们争相登上时隔六年首班开行的K27次列车。目的地：朝鲜首都平壤。【原文：Rush-hour was a notch louder at Beijing Station on Thursday, as passengers scurried to board the first K27 train service in six years. Destination: Pyongyang, capital of reclusive North Korea.】

item.title: 移动世界零售连锁企业拟通过首次公开募股筹集1.1亿美元
item.description: 移动世界投资集团旗下电子产品零售连锁企业——绿电投资股份公司计划于今年通过首次公开募股（IPO）筹集至少2.9万亿越南盾（约合1.1亿美元）。【原文：Mobile World Investment Corp.’s electronics retail chain unit Dien May Xanh Investment JSC aims to raise at least 2.9 trillion dong ($110 million) from its planned initial public offering this year.】

item.title: 美国移动计划收购萨利纳斯持有的哥伦比亚资产
item.description: 墨西哥美洲移动公司正寻求收购萨利纳斯集团在哥伦比亚的部分电信业务，此举旨在扩大其在该地区的业务版图。【原文：Mexico’s America Movil SAB is seeking to buy some telecom operations of Grupo Salinas in Colombia as part of a push to expand its reach in the region.】

item.title: 新加坡必须培养更多人才来发展人工智能，政府高官表示
item.description: 新加坡已投入逾10亿新元（7.82亿美元）打造全球人工智能枢纽。但该计划的首席设计师之一指出，该国在人工智能准备度方面的举措可能尚显不足。【原文：Singapore has committed more than S$1 billion ($782 million) to become a global hub for artificial intelligence. But one of the architects of that effort says the country’s approach to AI readiness may not be sufficient.】

item.title: 对冲基金Regal因澳大利亚生物科技股暴跌93%遭受重创
item.description: 悉尼对冲基金Regal Partners Ltd.近日再遭重创。其投资的澳大利亚生物科技公司Immutep Ltd.周五宣布暂停肺癌药物临床试验，导致该公司市值蒸发逾5.82亿澳元（约合4.12亿美元）。【原文：Sydney hedge fund Regal Partners Ltd. was dealt a fresh blow after Immutep Ltd., an Australian biotech company it backs, wiped out most of its A$582 million ($412 million) market value on Friday when it halted trials of a lung cancer drug.】

item.title: 澳大利亚黄金矿商北方之星股价下跌，因产量指引下调
item.description: 北方星资源有限公司股价创六年来最大跌幅，此前这家黄金矿商因加工厂出现问题而下调产量预期。【原文：Northern Star Resources Ltd. sank the most in six years after the gold miner cut output guidance due to problems at a processing mill.】

item.title: 高市因感冒症状缺席特朗普访日前活动
item.description: 日本首相高市早苗周四因出现感冒症状，取消了部分官方活动行程。此前她原定数日后启程赴美，与美国总统特朗普举行会晤。【原文：Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi canceled her participation in some official events Thursday after developing cold-like symptoms, days before she’s scheduled to depart for a trip to the US to meet with President Donald Trump.】

item.title: 交易员抓住中国电力公司美元债券可能失误的契机
item.description: 一家中国能源建设巨头无意间将目光投向了信贷市场的冷门角落，投资者正试图利用技术性漏洞，使固定收益回报翻倍有余。【原文：A Chinese energy-construction giant is inadvertently spotlighting an arcane corner of the credit markets, where investors seek to use a technicality to potentially more than double their fixed-income returns.】

item.title: 阿布扎比投资局（ADIA）投资私募债务公司迪格纳里（Dignari）
item.description: 阿布扎比投资局旗下机构已向亚洲私募债务公司迪格纳里资本合伙公司注资，此举彰显其对该资产类别的坚定承诺，尽管全球市场动荡加剧。【原文：A unit of the Abu Dhabi Investment Authority has invested in Asian private debt firm Dignari Capital Partners, underscoring its commitment to the asset class despite heightened global market jitters.】

item.title: 苹果降低中国区应用商店抽成比例以应对当地监管机构
item.description: 苹果公司正降低其在中国向应用程序开发者收取的软件及应用内购买费用，此举旨在安抚监管机构对其数字产品的打压。【原文：Apple Inc. is lowering the fees it collects from app developers for software and in-app purchases in China, the latest move to appease regulators cracking down on its digital offerings.】

item.title: 布鲁克菲尔德寻求约8亿美元贷款用于收购World Freight
item.description: 知情人士透露，布鲁克菲尔德资产管理公司正寻求约8亿美元贷款，以支持其收购航空货运专家世界货运公司的计划，此举进一步推动了近期亚洲并购融资的热潮。【原文：Brookfield Asset Management Ltd. is seeking a loan of around $800 million to back its proposed purchase of air cargo specialist World Freight Co., according to people familiar with the matter, adding to a recent wave of acquisition financings in Asia.】

item.title: 美国地质调查局称土耳其发生5.3级地震
item.description: 据美国地质调查局称，土耳其埃尔巴市以东16公里处发生5.3级地震。【原文：An earthquake with a magnitude of 5.3 struck 16 kilometers east of Erbaa, Turkey, according to the United States Geological Survey.】

item.title: 任天堂股价因意外爆款《宝可梦大集结》飙升140亿美元
item.description: 任天堂公司正迎来十年来最大单周涨幅，其市值飙升140亿美元，这主要得益于全球意外爆红的《宝可梦：梦幻岛》。【原文：Nintendo Co. is headed for its biggest weekly gain in a decade with a $14 billion jump in value propelled by surprise global smash hit Pokémon Pokopia.】

item.title: 中国今年开年消费被视为疫情以来最差
item.description: 中国消费支出可能创下疫情以来最差开局，凸显出政府面临的挑战——其目标是扩大内需的作用。【原文：China’s consumer spending may have booked the worst start to any year outside the pandemic, highlighting the challenge to a government that has targeted a bigger role for domestic demand.】

item.title: 新加坡质疑美国贸易顺差数据 新一轮关税即将实施
item.description: 新加坡表示2024年对美贸易出现逆差，质疑华盛顿公布的数据显示该城市国家实现贸易顺差的说法，并驳斥其助长全球制造业产能过剩的指控。【原文：Singapore said it ran a trade deficit with the US in 2024, disputing figures published by Washington that showed the city-state posted a surplus and challenging suggestions that it is contributing to global manufacturing overcapacity.】

item.title: 加杠杆押注引发亚洲股市恐将再度暴跌的担忧
item.description: 流入杠杆交易所交易基金的资金以及用于购买股票的高额借贷资金，正重新引发市场担忧：亚洲部分最大市场可能重演上周因战争引发的抛售潮。【原文：Inflows into leveraged exchange-traded funds and elevated levels of borrowed cash to buy stocks are reviving fears that some of Asia’s largest markets may suffer a repeat of last week’s war-induced selloff.】

item.title: 顶级基金称中国AI巨头比美国同行更具投资价值
item.description: 一只表现优异的新兴市场基金正加大对中国主要人工智能超大规模企业的投资，押注这些企业比那些正投入巨资扩张的美国科技巨头更具投资价值。【原文：A top-performing emerging markets fund is increasing its exposure to major Chinese artificial intelligence hyperscalers, betting they offer better value than US tech giants that are pouring vast sums into expansion.】

item.title: 马来西亚称航空公司或因燃油成本暂停部分航班
item.description: 马来西亚表示，如果中东战争导致燃油成本大幅上涨，航空公司可能需要暂停部分航班。【原文：Malaysia said airlines may need to suspend some flights if the Middle East war pushes fuel costs significantly higher.】

item.title: 巴西法官禁止美国官员探视监狱中的博索纳罗
item.description: 巴西最高法院法官亚历山大·德莫拉埃斯禁止美国国务院官员探视极右翼前总统贾伊尔·博索纳罗。博索纳罗目前正在该国首都服刑，刑期为27年。【原文：Brazil Supreme Court Justice Alexandre de Moraes barred a US State Department official from visiting Jair Bolsonaro, the right-wing former president who is serving a 27-year prison sentence in the country’s capital.】

item.title: 新西兰经济复苏势头或在2025年末放缓
item.description: 新西兰的经济复苏势头在2025年最后几个月可能已趋缓，这凸显出其经济复苏的脆弱性——即便尚未受到中东冲突升级和油价飙升的影响。【原文：New Zealand’s economic recovery probably lost momentum in the final months of 2025, highlighting its fragile nature even before any impact from the spiraling Middle East conflict and surging oil prices.】

item.title: 澳大利亚养老基金瞄准美国私有资产，纽约会议前夕布局
item.description: 澳大利亚最大养老基金之一Rest Super正积极寻求在美国私募市场的更多投资机会，这凸显了该国规模达4.5万亿澳元（3.2万亿美元）的养老金行业强劲的投资意愿。该基金目前正在美国三座城市进行路演。【原文：One of Australia’s biggest pension funds, Rest Super, is on the hunt for more private markets investments in the US, underscoring the strong appetite from the country’s fast-growing A$4.5 trillion ($3.2 trillion) sector that’s on a roadshow across three American cities.】

item.title: 小米内存、电动汽车困境令做空者损失18亿美元
item.description: 做空小米公司的投资者正获得丰厚回报，因内存价格飙升及电动汽车销量疲软令该公司盈利前景蒙上阴影。【原文：Short sellers betting against Xiaomi Corp. are reaping big gains, as surging memory prices and weakening electric-vehicle sales cloud the company’s earnings outlook.】

item.title: 秘鲁维持基准利率在4.25%不变，通胀压力持续攀升
item.description: 秘鲁央行维持利率不变，此前该国通胀率加速上升，首次突破目标区间的中点，这是逾一年来的首次。【原文：Peru left interest rates unchanged after inflation accelerated above the midpoint of its target range for the first time in more than a year.】

item.title: 投资者寻求对冲策略，战争打破数十年策略
item.description: 支撑对冲策略数十年的基本假设，正因伊朗局势的持续升级而分崩离析。【原文：The basic assumptions that have underpinned hedging strategies for decades are coming undone by the escalating war in Iran.】
